markdownRemark.html:
Purpose

I. The most effective to raise up children and young people in a sanctified environment for the practical building up of the Body of Christ
  (a) Double Cure: Touch reality of church life AND will be well-educated & develop love for learning
  (b) Kids need to develop:
      1. Character
      2. Autonomy
      3. Proper mind, emotion, will
      4. Love for Christ & the church

Definition

I. Outwardly, it’s basically a homeschooling program, but inwardly, it’s preparation for young ones to be useful to the Lord
    (a) Me and my spouse will care for my own children as well as the children of other saints

General Outline

I. Why RUNG?
    (a) Wordly Situation
        1. The worldly school system today is teeming with worldly influence. Satan wants to damage the young ones, so he’ll do whatever it takes to render them useless
    (b) The Lord’s Move
    (c) The Urgent Need of the One New Man
II. Prerequisites
    (a) Monetary Matters
    (b) Constitution of Parents
    (c) Things to Learn
    (d) General Principles
        1. Kids hate hypocrisy the most
        2. Some things need to be very strict, but young ones also need autonomy and self-fulfillment
III. Practical Carrying Out
    (a) Learning
        1. Doing
            1. Learn how to make money through freelance work
            2. Learn how to serve by actually serving
            3. Learn how to cook & do chores
        2. Exploring
            1. Kids can learn and/or play whatever interests them
                1. Experimentation
                2. Music
                3. Sports
                4. Art
                5. Coding
                6. Reading
                7. Acting
                8. Writing
                9. Building
            2. Can learn with:
                1. Khan Academy
                2. Crash Course
                3. YouTube ED
                4. TED
                5. MOOCs (edX)
            3. Avoid passive entertainment like TV or YouTube
        3. Principles
            1. Kids can work/learn in any body position they feel comfortable in (sit, stand, kneel)

Activities

I. Go on trips regularly
    1. Kids can earn wages to pay for trips (like Six Flags)
II. Lots of trips and service -> Projects in taking care of saints & church matters

Church Life
